name: Resizable
description: Draggable splitter for resizable panel layouts.

api.name: Resizable
api.description: Draggable splitter for resizable panel layouts.

parameters.name: PanelIndex
parameters.description: Index of the leading panel this handle resizes (the one immediately before it in the group). Dragging/arrow keys resize this panel against the panel at PanelIndex + 1.

parameters.name: WithHandle
parameters.description: When true, renders a small grip glyph centered on the handle for a more discoverable drag affordance.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the handle.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the handle.

examples.title: Horizontal
examples.code:
Panel One
Panel Two

examples.title: Vertical
examples.code:
Top
Bottom

examples.title: Collapsible Panel with Constraints
examples.code:
Sidebar
Content

examples.title: Three Panels
examples.code:
Sidebar
Content
Panel

parameters.name: Order
parameters.description: This panel's index within the group, also used as its key when registering/unregistering with the group and by PanelIndex to identify which panel a handle resizes.

parameters.name: DefaultSize
parameters.description: Initial percentage size of the panel, consumed by the group to seed the shared size list when the group has no DefaultSizes of its own. Defaults to 50.

parameters.name: MinSize
parameters.description: Minimum percentage size a handle drag can shrink this panel to. Defaults to 10.

parameters.name: MaxSize
parameters.description: Maximum percentage size a handle drag can grow this panel to. Defaults to 90.

parameters.name: Collapsible
parameters.description: When true, the panel can collapse to CollapsedSize — by dragging its handle below (roughly) half the MinSize, or via the group's ToggleCollapse from the cascading context. Restores on drag-out / toggle. (#257)

parameters.name: CollapsedSize
parameters.description: Percentage the panel occupies while collapsed. Default 0. Only meaningful when Collapsible is true.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The panel's content.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the panel.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the panel.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The group's ResizablePanels interleaved with ResizableHandles.

parameters.name: Direction
parameters.description: Axis panels are laid out and resized along. Horizontal arranges panels side-by-side with vertical handles; Vertical stacks them with horizontal handles. Defaults to Horizontal.

parameters.name: DefaultSizes
parameters.description: Explicit initial percentage sizes for each panel, in order. Takes precedence over each panel's own DefaultSize (but is itself superseded by SavedLayout). Length should match the number of panels.

parameters.name: SavedLayout
parameters.description: Optional previously-persisted panel sizes. The group seeds its layout from this on first render (taking precedence over panel DefaultSizes and DefaultSizes). Mirrors DataGrid / Tabs SavedLayout: the library never persists on its own — store the snapshot you receive from OnLayout and feed it back here on init.

parameters.name: OnLayout
parameters.description: Fires after every resize (drag, keyboard step, or collapse toggle) with the current panel sizes so the consumer can persist them. Pairs with SavedLayout to round-trip the layout through storage.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the group's root container.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the group's root container.

events.name: OnLayout
events.description: Fires after every resize (drag, keyboard step, or collapse toggle) with the current panel sizes so the consumer can persist them. Pairs with SavedLayout to round-trip the layout through storage.

records.name: ResizablePanelGroupContext
records.signature:
ResizablePanelGroupContext(
        string GroupId,
        Lumeo.Orientation Direction,
        EventCallback<(int PanelIndex, double Delta)> OnHandleDrag,
        Func<int, double> GetPanelSize,
        int PanelCount,
        Action<int, double, double, double, bool, double> RegisterPanel,
        Func<int, (double MinSize, double MaxSize)> GetPanelConstraints,
        Func<int, bool> IsPanelCollapsed,
        EventCallback<int> ToggleCollapse,
        Action<int> UnregisterPanel
    )

slots.name: ChildContent
slots.description: The group's ResizablePanels interleaved with ResizableHandles.

mdSummary:
# Resizable

Draggable splitter for resizable panel layouts.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Layout
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/resizable

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Resizable | Context | `ResizablePanelGroup.ResizablePanelGroupContext` | `default!` |  |
| Resizable | ScopedDirection | `LayoutDirection?` | `` |  |
| Resizable | PanelIndex | `int` | `0` | Index of the leading panel this handle resizes (the one immediately before it in the group). Dragging/arrow keys resize this panel against the panel at PanelIndex + 1. |
| Resizable | WithHandle | `bool` | `false` | When true, renders a small grip glyph centered on the handle for a more discoverable drag affordance. |
| Resizable | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the handle. |
| Resizable | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the handle. |
| ResizablePanel | Context | `ResizablePanelGroup.ResizablePanelGroupContext` | `default!` |  |
| ResizablePanel | Order | `int` | `0` | This panel's index within the group, also used as its key when registering/unregistering with the group and by PanelIndex to identify which panel a handle resizes. |
| ResizablePanel | DefaultSize | `double` | `50` | Initial percentage size of the panel, consumed by the group to seed the shared size list when the group has no DefaultSizes of its own. Defaults to 50. |
| ResizablePanel | MinSize | `double` | `10` | Minimum percentage size a handle drag can shrink this panel to. Defaults to 10. |
| ResizablePanel | MaxSize | `double` | `90` | Maximum percentage size a handle drag can grow this panel to. Defaults to 90. |
| ResizablePanel | Collapsible | `bool` | `false` | When true, the panel can collapse to CollapsedSize — by dragging its handle below (roughly) half the MinSize, or via the group's ToggleCollapse from the cascading context. Restores on drag-out / toggle. (#257) |
| ResizablePanel | CollapsedSize | `double` | `0` | Percentage the panel occupies while collapsed. Default 0. Only meaningful when Collapsible is true. |
| ResizablePanel | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | The panel's content. |
| ResizablePanel | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the panel. |
| ResizablePanel | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the panel. |
| ResizablePanelGroup | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | The group's ResizablePanels interleaved with ResizableHandles. |
| ResizablePanelGroup | Direction | `Lumeo.Orientation` | `Lumeo.Orientation.Horizontal` | Axis panels are laid out and resized along. Horizontal arranges panels side-by-side with vertical handles; Vertical stacks them with horizontal handles. Defaults to Horizontal. |
| ResizablePanelGroup | DefaultSizes | `double[]?` | `` | Explicit initial percentage sizes for each panel, in order. Takes precedence over each panel's own DefaultSize (but is itself superseded by SavedLayout). Length should match the number of panels. |
| ResizablePanelGroup | SavedLayout | `ResizableLayout?` | `` | Optional previously-persisted panel sizes. The group seeds its layout from this on first render (taking precedence over panel DefaultSizes and DefaultSizes). Mirrors DataGrid / Tabs SavedLayout: the library never persists on its own — store the snapshot you receive from OnLayout and feed it back here on init. |
| ResizablePanelGroup | OnLayout | `EventCallback<ResizableLayout>` | `` | Fires after every resize (drag, keyboard step, or collapse toggle) with the current panel sizes so the consumer can persist them. Pairs with SavedLayout to round-trip the layout through storage. |
| ResizablePanelGroup | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the group's root container. |
| ResizablePanelGroup | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the group's root container. |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (ResizablePanel) — The panel's content.
- `ChildContent` (ResizablePanelGroup) — The group's ResizablePanels interleaved with ResizableHandles.

## Events
- (none)

## Sub-components
- `ResizableHandle`, `ResizablePanel`, `ResizablePanelGroup`

## Cascading values it expects
- `Context` (`ResizablePanelGroup.ResizablePanelGroupContext`)
- `ScopedDirection` (`LayoutDirection?`)

## Services it injects
- `IComponentInteropService` ()
- `ThemeService` ()

## Keyboard
- `ArrowLeft` — OnKeyDown handles ArrowLeft in ResizableHandle.razor
- `ArrowRight` — OnKeyDown handles ArrowRight in ResizableHandle.razor
- `ArrowUp` — OnKeyDown handles ArrowUp in ResizableHandle.razor
- `ArrowDown` — OnKeyDown handles ArrowDown in ResizableHandle.razor

## Example
```razor
<Resizable />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-border`, `--color-primary`, `--color-ring`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/Resizable/ResizableHandle.razor`
- `UI/Resizable/ResizableLayout.cs`
- `UI/Resizable/ResizablePanel.razor`
- `UI/Resizable/ResizablePanelGroup.razor`
